query: INSERT INTO read_token (workspace_id, skill_id, principal, token_sha256, device_key_id, expires_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, NULL) ON CONFLICT (token_sha256) DO UPDATE SET workspace_id = excluded.workspace_id, skill_id = excluded.skill_id, principal = excluded.principal, device_key_id = excluded.device_key_id, expires_at = excluded.expires_at
